---------- Begin Simulation Statistics ----------
# This is a sample gem5 stats.txt file for development and testing.
# Generated by gem5; represents a short x86 SE-mode run.

simSeconds                                   0.000307   # Number of seconds simulated (s)
simTicks                                    307332500   # Number of ticks simulated
finalTick                                   307332500   # Number of ticks from beginning of simulation (without fast-forwarding)
simFreq                                1000000000000   # Frequency of simulated ticks
hostSeconds                                    1.23   # Real seconds taken
hostTickRate                              249863008   # Simulator tick rate (ticks/s)
hostMemory                                  1572864   # Number of bytes of host memory used
simInsts                                     614665   # Number of instructions simulated
simOps                                       614665   # Number of ops (including micro ops) simulated
hostInstRate                                499728   # Simulator instruction rate (inst/s)
hostOpRate                                  499728   # Simulator op rate (op/s)

system.cpu.numCycles                         614665   # Number of cpu cycles simulated
system.cpu.numWorkItemsStarted                    0   # Number of work items started
system.cpu.numWorkItemsCompleted                  0   # Number of work items completed
system.cpu.cpi                           1.000000   # CPI: cycles per instruction
system.cpu.ipc                           1.000000   # IPC: instructions per cycle
system.cpu.instsIssued                       614665   # Number of instructions issued
system.cpu.instsAdded                        614665   # Number of instructions added to IQ
system.cpu.dcache.overallHits::total          38412   # number of overall hits
system.cpu.dcache.overallMisses::total         2104   # number of overall misses
system.cpu.dcache.overallAccesses::total      40516   # number of overall accesses
system.cpu.icache.overallHits::total         614480   # number of overall hits
system.cpu.icache.overallMisses::total          185   # number of overall misses
system.cpu.icache.overallAccesses::total     614665   # number of overall accesses
system.cpu.branchPred.lookups                614665   # Number of branch lookups
system.cpu.branchPred.condPredicted          183421   # Number of conditional branches predicted
system.cpu.branchPred.condIncorrect           12340   # Number of conditional branches incorrectly predicted
system.cpu.commitStats0.committedInstType::No_OpClass         0   0.00%  # Num committed insts by type
system.cpu.commitStats0.committedInstType::IntAlu         507032  82.49%  # Num committed insts by type
system.cpu.commitStats0.committedInstType::MemRead          38412   6.25%  # Num committed insts by type
system.cpu.commitStats0.committedInstType::MemWrite         15882   2.58%  # Num committed insts by type

this is a malformed line without a numeric value

system.mem_ctrl.bytesRead::cpu.inst         2422656   # Number of bytes read from this memory
system.mem_ctrl.bytesRead::cpu.data          273024   # Number of bytes read from this memory
system.mem_ctrl.bytesWritten::cpu.data        67328   # Number of bytes written to this memory
system.mem_ctrl.numReads::cpu.inst            37854   # Number of read requests responded to by this memory
system.mem_ctrl.numReads::cpu.data             2672   # Number of read requests responded to by this memory
system.mem_ctrl.numWrites::cpu.data            1052   # Number of write requests responded to by this memory
